## Objective

Add formatting, Git metadata, and Git hook configuration.

## Tasks

- [ ] Add `biome.json`.
- [ ] Add `lefthook.yml`.
- [ ] Add `.editorconfig`.
- [ ] Add `.gitattributes`.
- [ ] Add `.gitignore`.
- [ ] Add commit/check conventions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Formatting config exists.
- [ ] Git hooks config exists.
- [ ] Root ignored files are correct.
- [ ] Formatting checks can run.
